name: RDP Desktop
summary: RDP session and X11 display queries for urirdp-docker.
description: RDP session and X11 display queries for urirdp-docker. A tellmesh capability pack adopted into urirun via its manifest (`urirun adopt-pack`): 5 rdp:// routes mapped 1:1 to bindings.v2, validated, ready to project to MCP tools / A2A skills.
useCases: Address rdp:// capabilities as URIs in a flow.
Project RDP Desktop operations to MCP tools / A2A skills.
Adopt the pack with one command, no code change.
requires: the tellmesh 'urirdp' pack (GitHub) for real handlers; dispatch works simulated without it
